criteria.description: Versioned registry (union of brief + matrix doc, deduped, research-only flagged) of token-saving tools.
criteria.evidence: internal/analyzer/token_saving_tools_test.go::TestRegistryAllowlistCoverage and TestRegistryInvariants; RegistryVersion()="phase-a-2026-05-19"
criteria.notes: 30 registry entries; 24 brief IDs (including ccstatusline) plus 6 reference/research-only entries from the matrix doc.

criteria.description: Each TokenSavingTool carries 14 typed fields including class, rank, risk, install policy, rollback guidance.
criteria.evidence: internal/analyzer/token_saving_tools_test.go::TestRegistryInvariants (enforces ID canonical form, InstallPolicy/ResearchOnly consistency, recommend_with_waiver requires rollback, class/rank uniqueness, source_url OR research_only, rank-99 sentinel = reference_only).

criteria.description: Public lookup API: GetTool, AllTools (sorted defensive copy), RegistryVersion. No mutation API.
criteria.evidence: TestRegistryVersionConstant, TestAllToolsSortedByClassAndRank, TestGetToolUnknownReturnsZero.

criteria.description: ToolState enum (unknown / mentioned_low / installed_medium / configured_medium / active_high / rejected_medium).
criteria.evidence: internal/analyzer/token_saving_types.go declares the six constants; values are exercised by every acceptance scenario test and pinned by the privacy allowlist.

criteria.description: EvidenceSource enum (11 values).
criteria.evidence: internal/analyzer/token_saving_types.go declares the 11 constants; used by registeredEvidenceSources filter in Recommend and by the privacy allowlist.

criteria.description: Signal enum (11 values).
criteria.evidence: internal/analyzer/token_saving_types.go declares the 11 constants; TestRecommend_AcceptanceScenarios exercises 8/11 directly and TestRecommendOnePlusOne sweeps all 121 pairs.

criteria.description: TokenSavingRecommendation output struct with the documented JSON tags.
criteria.evidence: JSON tags match contracts/token_saving_engine_go_api.md; marshalled in TestRecommendDeterminism and TestRecommendPrivacyBudget.

criteria.description: Recommend is a pure deterministic function of (signals, ToolStateMap).
criteria.evidence: TestRecommendDeterminism — 50 deterministic input rows, asserts bytes.Equal on json.Marshal across two calls.

criteria.description: Rule no_usage_visibility -> ccusage; if ccusage active + server-quota evidence -> ReasonServerQuotaCheck.
criteria.evidence: AS-01 and AS-02 in TestRecommend_AcceptanceScenarios; override branch at token_saving_recommendations.go:227-241.
criteria.notes: EvidenceFailureOrRejection is the documented Phase A proxy for server-quota mismatch; see token-saving-recommendation-engine.md Known Phase A gaps.

criteria.description: shell_output_bloat -> RTK state machine.
criteria.evidence: AS-03, AS-04, AS-05, AS-06 in TestRecommend_AcceptanceScenarios.
criteria.notes: Phase A gap RISK-2 documented: leanctx/headroom fallback is research_only until Phase B verifies URLs; AS-05/AS-06 accept Primary=nil.

criteria.description: mcp_tool_output_bloat -> context_mode state machine.
criteria.evidence: AS-07, AS-08, AS-09 in TestRecommend_AcceptanceScenarios.
criteria.notes: AS-09: distill/token_optimizer_mcp are research_only, so context_mode active -> Primary=nil. Phase A behavior is documented.

criteria.description: repeated_file_reads / broad_repo_exploration -> retrieval tier; no stacking.
criteria.evidence: AS-10 in TestRecommend_AcceptanceScenarios; eligibleCandidates filter drops research_only entries.
criteria.notes: Serena is research_only; engine emits claude_context as Primary. Phase A behavior matches spec intent (do not recommend Serena).

criteria.description: unchanged_file_rereads -> read_once/leanctx; if active and persists -> audit.
criteria.evidence: Rule 6 + advisory branch in token_saving_recommendations.go.
criteria.notes: Phase A gap RISK-3 documented: reread_guard candidates are all research_only/reference_only; rule fires an empty-PrimaryToolID advisory until Phase B verifies URLs.

criteria.description: mcp_skill_bloat -> prune/lazy-load/scope; never add another MCP by default.
criteria.evidence: TestRecommendMCPSkillBloatNeverAddsMCP sweeps mcp_skill_bloat paired with each of the 11 signals; asserts Primary class is never mcp_output_reducer or retrieval.
criteria.notes: Scoped to Primary; rule precedence places mcp_skill_hygiene (rule 2) ahead of mcp_output_reducer (rule 3), so MCP can only ever land as Secondary (matching FR-014 'by default').

criteria.description: output_verbosity only -> claude_token_efficient; caveman opt-in only.
criteria.evidence: AS-12 in TestRecommend_AcceptanceScenarios; caveman is research_only in registry.

criteria.description: <=1 primary + <=1 secondary; prefer input/context reductions; never stack untrusted shell/proxy/MCP without waiver.
criteria.evidence: TestRecommendOnePlusOne sweeps all 121 (s1, s2) pairs; asserts at most one Primary + one Secondary, classes differ when both present.

criteria.description: Skip any tool whose state is active_high; record in Skipped with ReasonActivePersistent.
criteria.evidence: TestRecommendSkipsActiveTool sweeps every rule class with a real candidate.

criteria.description: Conflict-state precedence: rejected_medium > active_high > configured_medium > installed_medium > mentioned_low > unknown.
criteria.evidence: TestToolStateMapResolve (token_saving_types_test.go) pins the full precedence lattice across all 36 (lo, hi) pairs plus the commutativity probe and the rejected-beats-active spot check.
criteria.notes: Engine assumes callers pre-resolve; Resolve is exposed as a public helper. Phase A gap RISK-6 documented.

criteria.description: Synthetic-input test suite exercising every acceptance scenario.
criteria.evidence: TestRecommend_AcceptanceScenarios (AS-01..AS-13 as table rows) + TestRecommendPrivacyBudget (AS-14 as dedicated function).
criteria.notes: DRIFT-1 documented: AS-14 lives in its own test function rather than the AS-01..AS-13 table; spec intent (synthetic-input coverage of every AS) is met.

criteria.description: Privacy test: marshalled output contains only allowlisted enum strings and bounded counts.
criteria.evidence: TestRecommendPrivacyBudget — positive-list scanner with built-in self-check probe (sk-ant-LEAKY injection); decoy-state sweep across all 11 single signals + sampled pairs.

criteria.description: Update existing remediation docs (token-saving-tooling-matrix.md, plugin-artifacts.md) additively.
criteria.evidence: Commit 276be53; git diff shows +28 insertions, 0 deletions across both files. WP06 reviewer verdict.

criteria.description: New engine doc (token-saving-recommendation-engine.md) covering classes, allowlist policy, dedupe contract, state model, risk/install policy, waiver gate, privacy, Phase B integration.
criteria.evidence: Commit 47a05b2 (initial 392-line doc) + ec20b81 (added Known Phase A gaps section). WP05 reviewer verdict.

criteria.description: Determinism: byte-identical marshalled JSON for identical inputs.
criteria.evidence: TestRecommendDeterminism (50 rows, bytes.Equal); map-iteration determinism audit in mission-review-report.md confirms only sort-helper-wrapped map ranges.

criteria.description: Privacy budget: zero raw/private strings in any engine output.
criteria.evidence: TestRecommendPrivacyBudget with built-in self-check probe (sk-ant-LEAKY injection confirms scanner catches unauthorized strings).

criteria.description: Additivity: no broad rewrites of internal/analyzer/types.go or ecosystem.go; existing tests stay green.
criteria.evidence: Mission-review verified: git diff dad606a..HEAD -- internal/analyzer/types.go internal/analyzer/ecosystem.go is empty. go test ./... green.

criteria.description: Hermetic tests: no network, no env reads, no filesystem writes outside test workdir.
criteria.evidence: Test imports limited to bytes, encoding/json, regexp, sort, strings, testing, unicode/utf8. Hermeticity probe in mission-review-report.md confirms no os.Exec/exec.LookPath/exec.Command/http.*/net.*/os.Getenv/os.Open/filepath.* calls in any token_saving_*.go file.

criteria.description: Registry exposes a monotonically increasing version identifier.
criteria.evidence: TestRegistryVersionConstant pins RegistryVersion() == "phase-a-2026-05-19" against a golden constant.
criteria.notes: RISK-8 documented (date-string is not a content hash); Phase B follow-up to consider content-hash golden.

criteria.description: Engine < 1 ms per call for <=50 tools x <=11 signals.
criteria.evidence: TestRecommendDeterminism runs 100 Recommend calls in ~0.2 s wall-clock for the entire internal/analyzer test package, well under the per-call budget.
criteria.notes: RISK-9 documented: no formal BenchmarkRecommend assertion; Phase B follow-up.

negative_invariants.description: No CLI / binary probing in Phase A (defer to issue #67). Token-saving source files must not invoke any subprocess / exec API.
Additivity invariant: internal/analyzer/types.go and ecosystem.go must be unchanged relative to the mission baseline.
Map keys in engine output must be static enum values; no raw log-derived strings.
